data.body: Docs: docs/plan-review-gate.md (two surfaces, three-pass+coach, Pass-3 math, advisory cap, proportionate scrutiny, attestation/freshness/invalidation, config, fail-open, sidecar, CI signal, honest time-to-first-work) + docs/reuse-surface.md + CLAUDE.md protocols. REMEDIATED: now ENUMERATES the full move registry (11 moves + templates + .rebar extension + C1 validator) and CROSS-REFERENCES the workflow-engine usage docs (workflow-authoring-v2/-editor; consolidated docs/workflow-engine.md is the pending 6f2d deliverable).
